---
title: Group Assignment 3 (10%)
---

The data you are to forecast is the same series you used in GA2. 

**Files for download**:

* Download the template

::: {.callout appearance="minimal"}
<i class="bi bi-download"></i> [GA3_template.qmd](../assignment_data/GA3_template.qmd){download="GA3_template.qmd"}
:::

::: {.callout appearance="minimal"}
<i class="bi bi-download"></i> [GA3 suggested solution.html](GroupAssignment3Solutions.html){download="GroupAssignment3Solutions.html"}
:::

You are to submit both an `GA3_GroupNo.qmd` file and a compiled `GA3_GroupNo.pdf` file for your assignment.

```{r}
#| output: asis
source(here::here("course_info.R"))
submit(schedule, "GA3")
```
